prompt: Please look up the account “Arbor Foods” at West Region and tell me its record ID and current next review date. This is only a check for now: do not change, cancel, or notify anything. In the final recap, give the record ID first, the original next review date second, and the corrected next review date third.

follow_up_turns.content: That is the right account. For that same record only, set the next review date to 2026-11-26; keep notifications off.
Small correction: set the next review date to 2026-12-12, not 2026-11-26. This replaces only the value from my last message; keep the same record and do not notify anyone.

stages.purpose: Resolve one exact target by name and location while leaving nearby distractors untouched.
Apply the first requested next review date only to the resolved target.
Replace the superseded next review date on that same target with the user's correction.

response_constraints: Keep every follow-up tied to the record resolved in the preceding stage; do not switch to a similarly named record.
Do not report a lookup or update as successful unless the corresponding tool result establishes it.
After the correction, report the final next review date and make clear that the first requested next review date was superseded.
The final recap must present these items in order: record ID; original next review date; corrected next review date.
